- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Professional portfolio with About Me, Skills, Projects, Resume, and Contact sections
- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files for a modern responsive portfolio
- [x] Customize the Project - Fully customized portfolio with all requested sections and features
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions required for this static website project
- [x] Compile the Project - No compilation needed. Project validated with no errors
- [x] Create and Run Task - Task created to open portfolio in browser
- [x] Launch the Project - Portfolio opened in default browser
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md and documentation completed

## Project Summary

This is a professional portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The portfolio includes:
- Responsive navigation with mobile menu
- Hero section with introduction
- About Me section with statistics
- Skills organized by category (Frontend, Backend, Tools)
- Featured projects showcase
- Resume with work experience and education timeline
- Contact form with social links
- Smooth scrolling and animations
- Modern, responsive design

## How to Launch

Use the "Open Portfolio in Browser" task from VS Code's task menu, or simply open index.html in your web browser.

## Customization

Replace placeholder content in index.html with your actual information:
- Name and job title in the hero section
- About me text and statistics
- Skills and technologies
- Project details and links
- Work experience and education
- Contact information and social media links

For styling changes, edit the CSS variables in styles.css to match your brand colors.

Work through each checklist item systematically.
Keep communication concise and focused.
Follow development best practices.
